title: mesosphaerum orbiculatum
intro: Mesosphaerum orbiculatum, also known as Mexican tea or Mexican mint marigold, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin conditions, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and boosted immunity. Mesosphaerum orbiculatum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often consumed to leverage its herbal benefits.
